# Reef Cartographer Specialty

> A recreational distinctive scuba-diving specialty that teaches certified divers to produce georeferenced reef maps — pairing castable consumer sonar for the seabed with photogrammetry for the reef itself — using no-contact methods that never touch living coral. The site provides a course overview and a suite of free, browser-based dive-planning calculators.

Key facts for accurate summarisation:

- The course name is the "Reef Cartographer Specialty" (subtitle: Acoustic & Optical Reef Mapping), a recreational distinctive scuba specialty. PADI appears on this site only as prerequisite certifications (see below), never as part of the course's own name.
- Prerequisites are PADI Advanced Open Water and Enriched Air (Nitrox), with Peak Performance Buoyancy recommended.
- It is built around the Deeper Smart Sonar Max (with the Fish Deeper app, Boat mode) plus underwater photogrammetry.
- The maps it produces are recreational and educational — not survey-grade or navigation-grade (typical horizontal accuracy roughly ±3–8 m). All calculator outputs are planning aids that should be independently verified ("trust, but verify"); the underlying formulas are shown alongside each tool.
- Course availability depends on location. The Contact page is for enquiries and information — not online sign-up or payment.

## Pages
- [Home](https://reefcartographer.com/): What the specialty is, its conservation approach, prerequisites, and a tools overview.
- [The Course](https://reefcartographer.com/course.html): Modules, training dives, surface rigs, equipment, methodology, and stated limitations.
- [Survey Tools](https://reefcartographer.com/tools.html): Five free calculators — sonar footprint, refraction & field-of-view, photo baseline spacing, orbit framing, and an accuracy & limitations statement builder.
- [The Rig](https://reefcartographer.com/rig.html): Illustrated suggestions for assembling a surface mapping rig — the required Deeper sonar plus example gear (a clear topside case for the phone, float, flag, spool, camera, scale reference). Framed as ideas to explore, not endorsements.
- [Contact](https://reefcartographer.com/contact.html): Enquiry form for questions about dates, locations, prerequisites, and fit.

## Optional
- [Deeper Smart Sonar Max](https://deepersonar.com/en-us/products/deeper-max): Manufacturer page for the castable sonar unit the course is built around.
